nav.logoffConfirm: Ka fita daga ko'ina? Wannan zai fitar da kai daga meet.witysk.org da one.witysk.org.

tiCafe.title: Kafe
tiCafe.subtitle: Membobin TI One Voice da ke kan layi a yanzu.
tiCafe.empty: Babu wani a kan layi a yanzu.
tiCafe.signInRequired: Shiga one.witysk.org tukuna don ganin wanda ke kan layi.
tiCafe.signInTitle: Shiga don ganin wanda ke Café
tiCafe.signInBody: Café yana nuna wanda ke live a cikin TI One Voice. Shiga da asusunka na one.witysk.org, ko kuma da asusun meet.witysk.org, sannan ka sake loda wannan shafin.
tiCafe.loadFailed: Ba a iya isa one.witysk.org ba. Ka sake gwadawa nan da nan.
tiCafe.openToTalk: Bude don hira — ka ji kyauta ka aiko da saƙon sirri
tiCafe.birthday: Yau ce ranar haihuwar wannan mai amfani
tiCafe.vouches_one: An tabbatar da {{count}} lokaci ta wasu masu amfani
tiCafe.vouches_other: An tabbatar da {{count}} sau daga wasu masu amfani
tiCafe.viaOneWitysk: Bayanan kai tsaye daga one.witysk.org. Bayanan martaba da hanyoyin saƙo suna buɗe a can a cikin sabon shafi.

createMeeting.needSignIn: Kana buƙatar shiga one.witysk.org kafin ka iya ƙirƙirar tarurruka.
createMeeting.haveJoinLink: Idan kana da hanyar shiga, bude ta kai tsaye — ba buƙatar asusu don shiga.
createMeeting.title: Ƙirƙiri taro
createMeeting.usingDefaults: Amfani da tsoffin saitunanku: har zuwa {{max}} mahalarta, {{recording}}.
createMeeting.fieldTitlePlaceholder: Taron mako-mako, 1:1 tare da Alice, da sauransu.
createMeeting.fieldBrandingHint: Ana nunawa a harabar da babban mashaya taro. JPEG, PNG, WebP ko GIF; har zuwa 2 MB.
createMeeting.visibilityHint: Ta hanyar tsoho, kai kaɗai ne kake ganin wannan taron a shafin Gida naka.
createMeeting.listForAuth: Lissafin sauran masu amfani da suka shiga a shafin Gida
createMeeting.listForAuthDesc: Duk wanda ya shiga ta one.witysk.org zai iya nema da shiga.
createMeeting.listForAnon: Hakanan jera ga baƙi da ba a sanya suna ba (waɗanda ba su shiga ba)
createMeeting.listForAnonDesc: Taron yana bayyana a shafin saukar da jama'a.
createMeeting.unsupportedImageType: Nau'in hoton da ba a tallafawa {{type}}; yi amfani da JPEG, PNG, WebP, ko GIF.
createMeeting.imageTooLarge: Hoton yana da {{mb}} MB; mafi girma shine 2 MB.
createMeeting.uploadFailed: An ƙirƙiri taron amma ɗora alamar ya gaza: {{message}}

discover.title: Gano
discover.subtitle: — tarurruka da aka bude don shiga

myMeetings.empty: Babu taro har yanzu — ƙirƙiri ɗaya a ƙasa.
myMeetings.deleteClosedConfirm: Share "{{title}}" har abada? Wannan yana cire taron daga jerin. Rikodi ba su shafa ba.
myMeetings.endMeetingConfirm: Ƙare "{{title}}" ga kowa? Wannan zai kori duk mahalarta.
myMeetings.inviteTitle: Ka gayyaci mutane ta hanyar imel
myMeetings.restartTitle: Bude wannan taron (yana kiyaye hanyar haɗi ɗaya)

room.endMeetingTitle: Ƙaddamar da taro da kuma korar kowa
room.endMeetingConfirm: Ka ƙare taron ga kowa? Wannan zai cire haɗin duk mahalarta.
room.inviteTitle: Ka gayyaci mutane ta hanyar imel

inMeetingSettings.title: Saituna
inMeetingSettings.camOnJoin: Lokacin da na shiga, kyamara ta kasance a kunne
inMeetingSettings.micOnJoin: Lokacin da na shiga, makirufo na a kunne
inMeetingSettings.soundOnJoin: Sauti lokacin da wani ya shiga
inMeetingSettings.quality: Ingancin bidiyo da aka fi so

tile.stopFlip: Dakatar da jujjuya bidiyo a kwance

background.label: Tasirin baya
background.needCamera: Kunna kyamarar don amfani da bangon baya
background.needCameraFirst: Ka kunna kyamarar ka da farko.
background.tooLarge: Hoton yana da {{mb}} MB; iyakar shi 4 MB.
background.processorFailed: Ba a tallafawa tasirin bango a wannan na'urar.

chatPanel.title: Hira
chatPanel.empty: Babu saƙonni har yanzu — ka ce sannu.

invite.title: Gayyato ta imel
invite.emailsHint: Raba da waƙafi, sarari, ko sabbin layi. Mafi yawan 20.
invite.messageHint: An nuna a cikin akwatin da aka nakalto a ƙarƙashin rubutun gayyata.
invite.validNeeded: Shigar da aƙalla adireshin imel ɗaya mai inganci.
invite.tooMany: Mafi yawan masu karɓa 20 a kowane aikawa.

recordings.title: Rikodi
recordings.subtitle: Rikodin taron ku daga gefen uwar garken. Fayilolin gida suna gogewa kai tsaye bayan kwanaki 30 (ko lokacin da kuka buga zuwa YouTube). Ana yin lodawa ne kawai da izinin mai shi.
recordings.empty: Babu rikodi tukuna. Fara taro sannan ka danna <1>Rikodi</1> don ɗaukar ɗaya.
recordings.signInBody: Rikodi na mai shi ne kawai. Shiga da asusunka na one.witysk.org, ko kuma da asusun meet.witysk.org, sannan ka sake loda wannan shafin.
recordings.publishTitle: Loda zuwa YouTube kuma share fayil ɗin gida idan an yi nasara
recordings.publishConfirm:
Shigar da wannan rikodin zuwa YouTube a matsayin {{privacy}}?
Idan an yi nasara, za a goge fayil ɗin na gida; kawai hanyar haɗin YouTube za ta rage.
recordings.deleteConfirm: Share wannan rikodin? Fayil ɗin gida (idan akwai) an cire shi amma an ajiye hanyar YouTube.
recordings.expiresInDays_one: (fayil ɗin yana ƙarewa a cikin {{count}} rana)
recordings.expiresInDays_other: (fayil ɗin zai ƙare nan da kwanaki {{count}})

settings.title: Saituna
settings.subtitle: Annabarwa ana adana su a wannan browser kawai. Suna aiki lokacin da ka shiga ko ƙirƙiri taro.

av.subtitle: Yadda makirufo da kyamarar ka ke aiki lokacin da ka shiga taro.
av.cameraDefault: Lokacin da na shiga, kyamara a kunne
av.micDefault: Lokacin da na shiga, makirufo na kunne
av.defaultVolumeHint: An yi amfani da shi ga mai kunna sautin taro lokacin da kuka shiga.
av.ptt: Matsa don magana (riƙe maɓallin don aikawa)
av.pttHint: Idan an kunna, makirifonka zai kasance a kashe sai ka riƙe maɓallin da ke ƙasa.

display.layoutAuto: Mai gabatarwa idan an saita, grid in ba haka ba
display.showNames: Nuna sunayen mahalarta a kan tiles
display.hideEmpty: Boye fale-falen da ba su da kyamara ko sauti
display.maxTiles: Matsakaicin fale-falen da ake iya gani a lokaci guda

meeting.subtitle: Ana amfani da shi lokacin da ka ƙirƙiri sabon taro — za ka iya canza shi kowane taro.
meeting.recordingAuto: Mai sarrafa kai — yi rikodin da zarar na shiga
meeting.recordingOff: Kashe — kar a ƙyale yin rikodi
meeting.autoEnd: Ƙare ta atomatik bayan (mintuna, 0 = ba za ta ƙare ba)
meeting.greetingHint: Ana nuna wa baƙi a shafin shiga.
meeting.welcomeHint: An buga wa chat lokacin da wani ya shiga.

moderation.subtitle: An sabunta tsarin taro na sababbin taro da mai shi kawai.
moderation.autoAdmit: Tabbatar da masu amfani da aka tabbatar ta atomatik
moderation.autoMute: Mute kai tsaye ga sabbin masu shiga
moderation.autoCamOff: Kashe kyamara ta atomatik ga sabbin masu shiga
moderation.lockOnStart: Kulle ɗakin bayan taron ya fara
moderation.allowSs: Bada dama ga mahalarta su raba allo
moderation.allowChat: Bada dama ga mahalarta su yi hira

recording.subtitle: Saitunan mai shi kawai don rikodin gefen uwar garken.
recording.includeChat: Haɗa rubutun taɗi tare da rikodin
recording.ssSeparate: Rikodin raba allo azaman fayil daban
recording.captions: Saka rubutun kai tsaye a cikin rikodin
recording.noticeOnStart: Nuna sanarwa ga mahalarta lokacin da rikodi ya fara

notifications.browserNotif: Nuna sanarwar burauza idan wani ya shiga
notifications.ignoreOwnJoins: Kar a kunna sauti don shigowata
notifications.highlightModActions: Nuna ayyukan mai gudanarwa a cikin tarihin ayyuka
notifications.dndEnd: Karɓa ba a damu ba yana ƙarewa (HH:mm)

privacy.secureMode: Fara sabon taro a yanayin tsaro (E2EE — yana hana yin rikodi)
privacy.retention: Share bayanan rikodi na bayan (kwanaki, 0 = tsoho na uwar garken na 30)
privacy.anonymise: Boye bayanan imel na mahalarta a cikin rajistar shiga ta uwar garken
privacy.noLogIp: Kar a yi rikodin adireshin IP na tare da abubuwan shiga
privacy.noReadReceipts: Kashe karanta saƙonni a cikin taɗi
privacy.blurEmail: Rufe imel ɗin mahalarta a hotunan allo na

accessibility.captions: Bayanan kai tsaye (an samar da su ta atomatik)
accessibility.announceEvents: Sanar da abubuwan da suka shafi mahalarta ta hanyar mai karanta allo
accessibility.focusOutlines: Koyaushe nuna zanen mai da hankali kan madannai
accessibility.monoAudio: Haɗa sauti guda ɗaya (masu amfani da kunne ɗaya)

keyboard.wheelZoom: Gujin ƙafafun yana ƙara girma tiles ɗin mahalarta

network.forceRelay: Koyaushe yi amfani da TURN (tilasta isar da kafofin watsa labarai)
network.prewarm: Dumama ICE a lokacin da shafin yake lodi

chat.saveHistory: Ajiye tarihin hira a wannan na'urar
chat.sendOnEnter: Shigar da aika (kashe don Ctrl/Cmd+Shigar don aika)
chat.autoTranslate: Fassara ta atomatik zuwa harshen mahaɗina

appearance.bgOpacityHint: Ya shafi bangon taro da kuma rufin harabar.

developer.experimentalHint: Wannan yana ba wa wannan mai bincike damar shiga fasahohin da za su iya zama ba cikakke ba ko kuma su canza ba tare da sanarwa ba.

reset.hint: Yana mayar da duk wani saiti a wannan shafin zuwa yanayin asali na masana'anta.

home.description: Taro, taron bidiyo na tushen burauza kyauta ga al'ummar witysk.org. Audio Café, raba allo, hira mai ɗorewa da hotuna, da rikodin kwanaki 30 — har zuwa mahalarta 50 a kowane ɗaki, babu shigarwa. Shiga da one.witysk.org ko ƙirƙiri asusun taro don gwaji kyauta na kwanaki 10.
home.upsellBody: Gwajin kyauta ta ƙare. Yi amfani da lambar kyauta ko biyan kuɗi don ci gaba da ƙirƙirar tarurruka. Shiga tarurruka, Audio Café, da hira suna kyauta.

auth.signupTrialNote: Za ku sami gwaji na kwanaki 10 kyauta — ƙirƙirar taro yana aiki nan take. Bayan gwajin, karɓi voucher ko biyan kuɗi don ci gaba da ƙirƙirar tarurruka.
auth.loginNote: Idan kana da asusun one.witysk.org, ana amfani da shi ta atomatik — babu buƙatar fom ɗin shiga a can.
auth.twoFactorPrompt: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 daga app ɗin ka na tantancewa — ko ɗaya daga cikin lambobin dawo da kanka.
auth.twoFactorPromptBoth: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 daga app ɗin tantancewar ku, lambar da aka aiko ta imel, ko lambar maidowa.
auth.twoFactorPromptEmail: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 da muka aiko maka ta imel.
auth.useEmail: Aiko mina lamba ta imel maimakon haka

account.title: Asushen ku
account.signInBody: Shiga a one.witysk.org ko ƙirƙiri asusun meet da farko.
account.cannotCreate: Ƙirƙirar taro: a kulle — yana buƙatar voucher ko biyan kuɗi
account.facepicSsoNote: Hotunanka na zuwa daga one.witysk.org kuma ana iya canza shi a can kawai.
account.profileSsoNote: Ana sarrafa bayanan martabarku a one.witysk.org. Canje-canje a can za su bayyana a nan ta atomatik.
account.deleteWarning: Share asusunka, hoton bayananka da alamomin sake saita kalmar sirri har abada. Taron da ka ƙirƙira ya kasance yana iya samun dama ga mahalarta waɗanda suke da hanyar haɗi, amma ba za a sake haɗa ka da su ba. Ba za a iya mayar da wannan aiki ba.
account.deleteConfirm: Shin kana son share asusunka na dindindin? Ba za a iya mayar da shi ba.

vouchers.title: Bauchi
vouchers.signInBody: Gudanar da voucher yana buƙatar asusun witysk.org mai izini.
vouchers.forbidden: Ba ka da izinin fitar da vouchers.
vouchers.note: Bayanan kula (na zaɓi, na ciki kawai)
vouchers.justIssued: Sabuwar voucher — kwafa kuma raba ta yanzu:
vouchers.empty: Babu takardun da aka bayar har yanzu.

upgrade.title: Haɓaka
upgrade.signInBody: Shiga (ko ƙirƙiri asusu) don karɓar voucher ko biyan kuɗi.
upgrade.intro: Samar da taron mara iyaka. Zaɓi biyan kuɗi na wata-wata ko shekara-shekara, ko kuma karɓi bauchi.
upgrade.cancelAnytime: Soke a kowane lokaci a PayPal
upgrade.recurring: Yana sabunta kai tsaye kowane wata
upgrade.paypalSoon: PayPal — yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba
upgrade.paypalConfigNote: Wayar biyan kuɗi ta PayPal tana aiki da zarar an saita PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID / SECRET a gefen uwar garken.
upgrade.oneShot: Biya ɗaya, babu sabunta kai tsaye
upgrade.bestValue: Watan biyu kyauta da kuma kowane wata
upgrade.ssoNoVoucher: Asusun SSO suna da haƙƙin gudanarwa — ba buƙatar takardar izini.
upgrade.redeemOk: An karɓi voucher — an ba da haƙƙin admin na kwanaki {{days}}, yana aiki har zuwa {{date}}.
upgrade.ssoNoPaypal: Asusun SSO suna da haƙƙin gudanarwa — ba buƙatar biyan kuɗi.
upgrade.subscribedOk: Biyan kuɗi yana aiki — an buɗe damar ƙirƙirar taro.
upgrade.subscribedOkYearly: Biyan shekara yana aiki — an buɗe damar ƙirƙirar taro.
upgrade.purchaseOk: An shigar da damar shekara. Na gode!
upgrade.monthlyOnceOk: An buɗe damar shiga na kwanaki 30. Na gode!
upgrade.paypalNoPlan: Ɗan Adam wata-wata na biyan kuɗi a cikin dashboard na PayPal kuma saita PAYPAL_PLAN_ID_MONTHLY.
upgrade.paypalNoPlanMonthly: PAYPAL_PLAN_ID_MONTHLY ba a saita shi a uwar garken ba.
upgrade.paypalNoPlanAnnual: PAYPAL_PLAN_ID_ANNUAL ba a saita shi a uwar garken ba.
upgrade.trialOffer: Gwada saduwa da cikakken haƙƙin ƙirƙirar taro na kwanaki 10. Sau ɗaya kawai a kowane asusu — babu buƙatar katin.
upgrade.trialExpired: An yi amfani da gwajin ku. Yi rajista ko fanshi wani bauchi don ci gaba da ƙirƙirar tarurruka.
upgrade.choosePath: Sake sabuntawa kai tsaye ko biya sau ɗaya
upgrade.choosePathYear: Sake sabuntawa ta atomatik ko biya sau ɗaya
upgrade.autoRenew: Sake sabuntawa kai tsaye kowane wata
upgrade.billOnce30: Biyan kuɗi ɗaya — kwanaki 30, babu sabunta kai tsaye
upgrade.billOnce365: Biyan kuɗi ɗaya — kwanaki 365, babu sabuntawa ta atomatik
upgrade.activeSubMonthly: Biyan PayPal kowane wata ta atomatik.
upgrade.activeSubAnnual: Biyan PayPal na shekara mai sabunta kai.
upgrade.cancelConfirm: Soke sabunta kai tsaye? Kuna ci gaba da samun dama har sai lokacin da kuka riga kuka biya ya ƙare.
upgrade.cancelOk: An sabunta kai ta kare. Ana ci gaba da samun dama har sai lokacin biyan ku ya ƙare.

forgot.title: Sake saita kalmar sirrinka
forgot.intro: Shigar da adireshin imel ɗin da kuka yi amfani da shi don yin rajista. Idan muka sami asusun da ya dace, za mu aiko muku da hanyar haɗin sake saitin kalmar sirri wanda zai yi aiki na mintuna 30.
forgot.done: Idan wannan imel ɗin ya yi rijista, hanyar sake saiti tana kan hanya. Duba akwatin saƙonka (da kuma jakar spam).

reset.title: Zaɓi sabon kalmar sirri
reset.missingToken: Dole ne a buɗe wannan shafi daga hanyar haɗin da ke cikin imel ɗin sake saitin kalmar sirri.
reset.done: An sabunta kalmar sirri. Ana tura zuwa shiga...

twofa.title: Tabbatar da shiga ta hanyoyi biyu
twofa.intro: Ƙara mataki na biyu a lokacin shiga. Yi amfani da app ɗin tantancewa, lambar da aka aiko ta imel, ko duka biyun.
twofa.scanQr: Yi scanning da Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, ko wani app na TOTP:
twofa.recoveryHeading: Ajiye waɗannan lambobin dawo da asusu
twofa.recoveryWarning: Kowace lambar tana aiki sau ɗaya idan ka rasa damar shiga na'urar tantancewa. Ba za a sake nuna su ba.
twofa.regenerate: Sake haifar da lambobin dawo da asusu
twofa.regenerateConfirm: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 na yanzu daga app ɗinka don fitar da sabbin lambobin dawo da asusu:
twofa.emailIntro: Muna aika lambar lambobi 6 zuwa adireshin asusunka a duk lokacin da ka shiga.
twofa.emailSentTo: An aika lambar zuwa {{to}}. Shigar da ita a ƙasa don kunna lambobin imel.

subStatus.title: Biyan kuɗi
subStatus.planMonthlySub: Biyan kuɗi na wata-wata (sabuntawa ta atomatik)
subStatus.planAnnualSub: Biyan kuɗi na shekara (sabunta kai tsaye)
